---
title: "Dookie2025 Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
```

```{r}
#setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
getwd()
```


# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
# tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)
```

DEBUG

```{r}
tar_load(df_simNameByCult)
tar_load(df_obs_meta_data)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs_raw)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs_raw_clean)
tar_load(df_list_PCDS)
tar_load(df_PCDS_int)
tar_load(df_dateStageTargetReached)
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput)
tar_load(df_haun_pheno_dates)
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput_haunBased)



tar_load(df_list_PCDS)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs)
df1<-processed_met_data$data
info_3 <- tar_read(df_list_PCDS)

x<-info_3$pcds_3_emergPlants
tar_read(msg_obs_saved)
tar_load(df_observed_wide)

tar_load(df_haun_pheno_dates)
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput_haunBased)
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs_raw_clean)
```

```{r}
require(dplyr)
require(targets)

# 1. Load the master list of all expected SimulationNames
master_df <- tar_read(df_simNameByCult)
expected_sims <- unique(master_df$SimulationName)

# 2. Load the interpolated data you want to check
pcds_int <- tar_read(df_PCDS_int)
pcds_int <- tar_read(df_list_PCDS)

# 3. Extract the surviving SimulationNames safely
if (is.data.frame(pcds_int)) {
  surviving_sims <- unique(pcds_int$SimulationName)
} else if (is.list(pcds_int)) {
  # If it's a list of dataframes, bind them first
  surviving_sims <- unique(dplyr::bind_rows(pcds_int)$SimulationName)
} else {
  stop("df_PCDS_int is an unexpected format.")
}

# 4. Find the ones that got dropped (In Expected, but NOT in Surviving)
dropped_sims <- setdiff(expected_sims, surviving_sims)

# 5. Print the autopsy report
message("==========================================================")
message("   DROPPED SIMULATIONS REPORT")
message("==========================================================")
message("Total Expected:  ", length(expected_sims))
message("Total Surviving: ", length(surviving_sims))

if (length(dropped_sims) == 0) {
  message("\n✅ PERFECT: No simulations were dropped!")
} else {
  message("\n❌ ALERT: ", length(dropped_sims), " simulations are missing:")
  print(dropped_sims)
}
message("==========================================================")
```

```{r}
require(dplyr)
require(targets)

target_sim <- "DookieWWHI2024CvMowhawkSow17-Apr"
pcds_list <- tar_read(df_list_PCDS)

# Flatten and filter for Mowhawk
mowhawk_timeline <- dplyr::bind_rows(pcds_list, .id = "df_name") %>%
  dplyr::filter(SimulationName == target_sim) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Date)

# Print the findings
message("Total PCDS observations found for Mowhawk: ", nrow(mowhawk_timeline))
print(mowhawk_timeline)
```


```{r}
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput_haunBased)

tar_read(df_apsimStageInput)
#install.packages("weatherOz")
tar_read(soil_data_clean)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno_hi)
tar_load(list_observed_clean)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs_raw)
```
